scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/public/tailwind.input.css -o src/public/styles.css --watch & NODE_ENV=development bun --watch src/main.ts
scripts.dev:accept-nodes: NODE_ENV=development bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/public/tailwind.input.css -o src/public/styles.css --watch & NODE_ENV=development bun --watch src/main.ts -- --accept-nodes
scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.build:binary: bun run build:css && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-link
